Instance Method# gen32IOVMSegments

macOS 10.11.4+

```
IOReturn gen32IOVMSegments(UInt64 *offset, Segment32 *segments, UInt32 *numSegments);
```

## [See Also](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1547749-gen32iovmsegments#see-also)

### [Configuring the Memory Descriptor](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1547749-gen32iovmsegments#configuring-the-memory-descriptor)

[`setMemoryDescriptor`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1811308-setmemorydescriptor)Sets and resets the DMACommand's current memory descriptor[`- setMemoryDescriptor`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1547727-setmemorydescriptor)Sets and resets the DMACommand's current memory descriptor[`clearMemoryDescriptor`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1811032-clearmemorydescriptor)Clears the DMACommand's current memory descriptor[`- clearMemoryDescriptor`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1547715-clearmemorydescriptor)Clears the DMACommand's current memory descriptor[`getMemoryDescriptor`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1811175-getmemorydescriptor)Get the current memory descriptor[`- getMemoryDescriptor`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1547753-getmemorydescriptor)Get the current memory descriptor[`- getIOMemoryDescriptor`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1547736-getiomemorydescriptor)[`getPreparedOffsetAndLength`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1811194-getpreparedoffsetandlength)Returns the offset and length into the target IOMemoryDescriptor of a prepared IODDMACommand.[`- getPreparedOffsetAndLength`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1547765-getpreparedoffsetandlength)Returns the offset and length into the target IOMemoryDescriptor of a prepared IODDMACommand.[`genIOVMSegments`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1811150-geniovmsegments)Generates a physical scatter/gather for the current DMA command[`- genIOVMSegments`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1547720-geniovmsegments)Generates a physical scatter/gather for the current DMA command[`gen32IOVMSegments`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1811104-gen32iovmsegments)Helper function for a type checked call to genIOVMSegments(qv), for use with an IODMACommand set up with the output function kIODMACommandOutputHost32, kIODMACommandOutputBig32, or kIODMACommandOutputLittle32. If the output function of the IODMACommand is not a 32 bit function, results will be incorrect.[`gen64IOVMSegments`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1811126-gen64iovmsegments)Helper function for a type checked call to genIOVMSegments(qv), for use with an IODMACommand set up with the output function kIODMACommandOutputHost64, kIODMACommandOutputBig64, or kIODMACommandOutputLittle64. If the output function of the IODMACommand is not a 64 bit function, results will be incorrect.[`- gen64IOVMSegments`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1547722-gen64iovmsegments)[`- createCopyBuffer`](/documentation/kernel/iodmacommand/1547729-createcopybuffer)
